item.title: How a Loud Anvil Becomes Shop-Quiet
item.description: A simple fix does more than reduce noise—it changes how the whole tool works in the shop.

item.title: Saving a Well-Worn Tool Handle
item.description: A blacksmithing restoration look at why a beat-up handle was worth saving, showing careful shop work and respect for old tools.
